comment: 故事册剧情纪念贴纸（幕奖励专属，小铺不卖）。kind=sticker 与 sticker_items 同管线同画风；id 与 items.ts renderRef 'sticker:story_*' 对应。加一册只需 append 一行，直出 webp 资产：
recipe: cd server && node --env-file=.env tools/gen_ui_assets.mjs tools/story_stickers.manifest.json ../assets/stickers --webp --candidates 1  # 幂等只补缺的；港区 403 先 --emit-jobs 去首尔拉图再 --raw-dir <dir> --webp

assets.prompt: a cute little haystack bundle of golden straw tied with a rope, a few straws sticking out
a small stack of warm brown wooden planks with visible wood grain and two round nails
a sturdy little red brick house with a triangle roof and a tiny chimney, cozy and strong
a woven wicker picnic basket full of treats with a red-and-white checkered cloth peeking out, a couple of little cakes on top
a pair of sparkly ruby-red slipper shoes covered in tiny glittering red gemstones, shiny and magical with little bows
a cute little emerald-green crystal castle with sparkling shiny towers and a tiny flag on top, glowing softly, cheerful
a cheerful little triangular pennant cheer flag on a short wooden stick, bright red and sunny yellow stripes, a tiny star on it, waving as if cheering at a race
